pageContext.name: Moon Knight: Vigilante
pageContext.description: I became Moon Knight to battle evil wherever I could find it. And I never had to look farther than the darkness inside my own heart.   Sideshow Art Prints and Bill Sienkiewicz Art present the Moon Knight: Vigilante Fine Art Lithograph, a new Marvel Comics art print for fans of the Fist of Khonshu.  As the Avatar of Khonshu, Egyptian god of the moon, Marc Spector is tasked with shining a light in the darkness. He dons the persona of Moon Knight in order to punish those living in the shadows of evil. This moody illustration by Bill Sienkiewicz shows the astral glow of Marc's crescent moon blades as he embraces the chaos that comes from the changing lunar cycle and his own life in service of Khonshu.  Originally created as a cover for the movie magazine Empire, this portrait of a celestial super hero is now available for fans in a fine art collectible format. Each Moon Knight: Vigilante Fine Art Lithograph is hand-signed by Sienkiewicz and includes a Certificate of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of only 100 pieces. Available as an unframed certified archival lithograph print or in a custom framed presentation, this Moon Knight wall art is a must-have for Marvel collectors!   Begin a new phase of your collection and bring home the Moon Knight: Vigilante Fine Art Lithograph by Bill Sienkiewicz today.
